title: Studio Raw
description: A boutique reformer Pilates studio in South Yarra. We launched their social from zero, using short-form video and member UGC to fill every class within 3 months of opening.
results: 45 UGC posts from members in first month
body:
## The Brief

Studio Raw was opening a new reformer Pilates studio in South Yarra and needed to build anticipation before doors opened. The founder had zero social media presence and no marketing budget beyond our retainer.

## Our Approach

We started 8 weeks before launch. Phase one was a teaser campaign — behind-the-scenes TikToks of the studio build-out, the reformer installation, the aesthetic details. Phase two was a "founding members" campaign offering early bird pricing, promoted through Instagram Stories and a referral incentive.

Post-launch, we shifted to a UGC strategy: every member who posted a Story tagging Studio Raw got featured on the main account.

## The Results

By opening day, Studio Raw had 6,200 followers and a waitlist. Within 3 months, class occupancy hit 92%. The UGC strategy generated 45 organic member posts in the first month alone — content we repurposed into paid ads with a 2.8x ROAS.
